scenes.description: 室外健身区，小孩穿着蓝色毛绒外套在健身器材上摆动锻炼，周围绿植环绕，氛围温馨活泼。
scenes.video_prompt: A lively child wearing a blue fluffy jacket with yellow trims and a red bow on the hood sits on outdoor fitness equipment, gently swinging back and forth while holding the ropes. The setting is a sunlit courtyard with gray stone tiles, surrounded by lush greenery and distant building walls. Warm natural lighting enhances the familial, cheerful atmosphere. Static wide shot with slight handheld stability, capturing full-body movement. 4K resolution, daylight color grading, shallow depth of field.

style_elements.characters: Child in blue jacket with red bow, masked, playful and energetic
style_elements.environment: Outdoor fitness area, gray stone pavement, green plants, daytime sunlight
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, natural lighting, realistic family-friendly aesthetic
style_elements.camera_movement: Static wide-angle shot with minimal movement

scenes.description: 夜晚星空下，金发女性身穿白色连衣裙骑在白马上，神情专注，环境梦幻宁静。
scenes.video_prompt: A young woman with long golden hair rides gracefully on a white horse under a starry night sky, wearing a flowing white dress with a black belt and delicate necklace. Soft ambient light illuminates her calm, focused expression as she holds the reins. The background features a dreamy landscape with twinkling stars and gentle illumination creating a serene, magical mood. Slow dolly backward shot to emphasize motion and emotion. Cinematic 4K, cool-toned grading, shallow focus on rider and horse.

style_elements.characters: Young woman with golden hair, white dress, black belt, elegant and composed
style_elements.environment: Nighttime outdoor scene, starry sky, soft ambient lighting, mystical ambiance
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow dolly backward movement tracking the horse
